title: I'll Be There
overview: When Grace’s brother, AJ, undergoes life-threatening surgery, she ends up becoming his caregiver. These siblings reconnect and realize that, no matter how distant they have grown, they’ll always be a part of each other. The story is set in Los Angeles during the days after Michael Jackson’s death, and as Grace tries to reconcile her complicated relationships with her siblings, she is also saying goodbye to the icon who was the soundtrack to that chapter of her life.
